name: AIsa Tavily Search
description: Requires node, and AISA_API_KEY. Uses the supplied AISA_API_KEY to send requests to https://api.aisa.one. Native-first ClawHub plugin for `aisa-tavily-search`. Ships the packaged AIsa skill with an `openclaw.plugin.json` manifest and a Claude-compatible bundle fallback. Run web, multi-source, or last-30-days research through AIsa. Use when: the user needs search, synthesis, competitor scans, or trend discovery. Supports research-ready outputs and structured retrieval.

commands.name: aisa-tavily-search
commands.description: Run web, multi-source, or last-30-days research through AIsa. Use when: the user needs search, synthesis, competitor scans, or trend discovery. Supports research-ready outputs and structured retrieval.

AISA_API_KEY.title: Aisa Api Key
AISA_API_KEY.description: Provide AISA_API_KEY for the packaged AIsa skill runtime.

providerAuthChoices.choiceHint: Used only to authorize requests to the AIsa API service.
providerAuthChoices.cliDescription: AISA_API_KEY used by the packaged skill runtime.
